goal_results.evidence: bug-report.yml: title '[BUG] ', labels ['bug'], 9 body sections (checkboxes, input, dropdown, 6 textareas), checklist is checkboxes type, package is dropdown type, 4 required textareas (description, reproduction, expected, actual). Test gate bug_report_complete=true.

config.yml contains only 'blank_issues_enabled: false' — no contact_links section. Test gates config_correct=true and _p2p_no_contact_links=true.
Both templates' dropdown options are exactly {cluefin-openapi, cluefin-ta, cluefin-cli, cluefin-desk, cluefin-xbrl}, matching the PR template. Test gate package_alignment=true.
All 3 files exist at .github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/{bug-report.yml, feature-request.yml, config.yml} and parse as valid YAML. Test gates files_exist=true and yaml_valid=true.

judge_notes: All 5 goals met. Ran the test verifier inline — all 7 gates (6 F2P + 1 P2P) pass. Score = 0.39+0.39+0.10+0.10+0.02 = 1.00.
